basic_details.job_title: IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur) Professional Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Kharagpur. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Recruitment 2026 for the post of Professional Trainee.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with Intermediate Level Certificate from ICAI or ICMAI
qualification.details: Graduation with Intermediate Level Certificate from Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICAI).

selection_process: Online Application Short-listing based on uploaded documents
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kharagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kharagpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduation with Intermediate Level Certificate from Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICAI).

content_sections.heading: IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Application Fee 2026
IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Online Application Short-listing based on uploaded documents

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kharagpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee posts is 09-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Professional Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Professional Trainee position at IIT Kharagpur. This is a good opportunity for eligible candidates to join the esteemed institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Professional Trainee role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree along with an Intermediate Level Certificate from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or the Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICAI) to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Professional Trainee post is 25 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professional Trainee position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Professional Trainee role will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-. This stipend is offered for the duration of the contractual employment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIT Kharagpur Professional Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, while SC, ST, and Women candidates are required to pay Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Professional Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application followed by short-listing of candidates based on the documents they upload. Further stages, if any, will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Professional Trainee position at IIT Kharagpur is a contractual job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is advisable to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIT Kharagpur?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur is located in Kharagpur, West Bengal. Candidates should be prepared to work at this location if selected.
